name: School Report Card -> Email Parent Delivery

parameters.message:

parameters.subject: =Progress Report: {{ $('Build HTML Report Card').item.json.Student_Name }}, Class: {{ $('Get row(s)').item.json.Class }}{{ $('Get row(s)').item.json.Section }},{{ $('Get row(s)').item.json.Academic_Year }}

parameters.content:
## 🎬 Manual Trigger

Starts the workflow manually from the n8n editor.

### 🔹 Use Case:
• Testing the workflow  
• Debugging logic  
• One-time execution

## 📥 Fetch Student Records

Retrieves student data from the Data Table.

### 🔹 What it does:
• Fetches rows where **Status is empty**  
• Filters only pending report cards  

### 🎯 Purpose:
• Prevent duplicate processing  
• Acts as the main data source

## 🔁 Loop Through Students

Processes records one-by-one using batching.

### 🔹 What it does:
• Splits data into individual items  
• Runs workflow per student  

### 🎯 Purpose:
• Avoid overload  
• Improve reliability  
• Enable controlled execution

## 🚫 Skip Already Sent Reports

Filters out students whose reports are already sent.

### 🔹 Condition:
• If Status ≠ "Sent" → Continue  
• Else → Skip  

### 🎯 Purpose:
• Prevent duplicate emails  
• Ensure idempotent workflow

## 📊 Calculate Grades & Remarks

Core logic for student evaluation.

### 🔹 What it calculates:
• Subject-wise marks  
• Total & percentage  
• Grade (A+, A, B, C, D)  
• Pass/Fail per subject  
• Attendance status  

### 🧠 Extra:
• Dynamic remarks based on performance  
• Color coding for UI

## 🧾 Generate HTML Report Card

Creates a fully styled report card in HTML.

### 🔹 Includes:
• School header  
• Student details  
• Subject table  
• Grade summary  
• Attendance & remarks  

### 🎯 Purpose:
• Prepare printable design  
• Maintain consistent layout

## 📄 Convert HTML to PDF

Transforms HTML report into a PDF file.

### 🔹 What it does:
• Sends HTML to PDF API  
• Generates downloadable PDF link  

### 🎯 Purpose:
• Shareable format  
• Print-ready output

## 📧 Send Email to Parents

Delivers report card via email.

### 🔹 Includes:
• Student name  
• Grade & percentage  
• PDF download link  

### 🎯 Purpose:
• Notify parents instantly  
• Digital delivery system

## ⏳ Delay Execution

Adds a delay before next operation.

### 🔹 What it does:
• Waits for 3 seconds  

### 🎯 Purpose:
• Prevent API rate limits  
• Avoid email throttling

## ✅ Update Student Record

Marks report as sent in Data Table.

### 🔹 Updates:
• Status → Sent  
• Sent_At → Timestamp  
• Report_URL → PDF link  

### 🎯 Purpose:
• Track delivery  
• Prevent reprocessing

## 🎓 Report Card Automation

This workflow automatically generates and sends student report cards to parents.

It fetches student data, calculates performance (marks, percentage, grade, remarks), creates a professional PDF report card, emails it to parents, and updates the system to avoid duplicate sending.

### 🔄 Flow:
Fetch Data → Process Students → Generate Report → Convert to PDF → Send Email → Update Status
